assertions.assertion: Uses CookieContainer and HttpClientHandler with AllowAutoRedirect = false for cookie-based session simulation
assertions.rationale: BffUserEndpointTests constructor creates CookieContainer, HttpClientHandler with AllowAutoRedirect = false.

assertions.assertion: Test asserts /bff/user returns HttpStatusCode.Unauthorized (401) without a prior login
Test asserts the local API route returns HttpStatusCode.BadRequest (400) when the x-csrf header is missing
Includes the x-csrf: 1 header on the antiforgery-passing test case
assertions.rationale: LocalApiEndpoint_WithAntiforgeryHeader_ShouldNotReturn400 adds x-csrf: 1 header and asserts NotEqual(BadRequest).
